metadata.name: Set a Product as Featured on Homepage

description: A merchandiser wants to feature a new, high-margin product in the 'Featured Products' section of the homepage.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product to be featured.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent selects the correct product SKU.

nodes.task_description: Add the product to the 'Homepage Featured' collection.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the product to the special collection that populates the homepage section.
